title: Pipestation 15mm Compression Straight Connectors (2 Pack) | Brass Plated Compression Joint Plumbing Fittings for Copper Plumbing Pipe Connectors | Compressions Plumbers Pipe Fitting - Easy Install
features: BEST VALUE PACK - Get 2 brass plated Brass Compression Straight Connectors from Pipestation, offering unmatched value for your plumbing projects. Perfect for 15mm pipe-work jobs in both residential and commercial settings.

EASY TO INSTALL - Our WRAS approved compression fittings require no soldering, ensuring effortless installation. Simply slide onto the pipe and tighten for a secure and leak-free joint, saving you time and effort.

SOLID BRASS CONSTRUCTION - Crafted from solid brass and manufactured to EN1254 standards, our compression straight connectors are incredibly durable and resistant to corrosion. Designed to withstand high temperatures and pressure for long-lasting performance.

VERSATILE APPLICATION - These compression fittings are widely used to join 15mm copper pipes in water systems, providing a reliable and seamless connection. Versatile for various plumbing applications, from home renovations to professional installations.

WHAT YOU GET - Each pack includes 2 premium-quality 15mm brass plated Compression Straight Connectors from Pipestation. Trust in our product for dependable and durable plumbing solutions that stand the test of time.
